summary: A website with appointment requests and feedback forms. Users can submit appointments and feedback on the website. An admin dashboard (now accessible to all users with username and password) displays submitted appointment requests and feedback.
architectural_notes: Dashboard access is not restricted to admins — any authenticated user (username + password) can view appointments and feedback

existing_features.title: Remove the admin-only access restriction from the dashboard. Any user who provides a non-empty username and password should be granted access to view the appointments and feedback sections, without requiring special admin credentials or role checks.

new_feature_requests.summary: Show appointment requests submitted on the website in the admin dashboard appointments section
Show feedback requests submitted on the website in the admin dashboard feedbacks section
Remove admin-only access restriction — all users with a username and password can access the appointments and feedback dashboard

Remove or bypass any backend admin role checks that restrict reading appointments and feedback data, so that any authenticated session (any username/password) can retrieve and view submitted appointments and feedback.
